raw_record.title: Director Applied ML AI
raw_record.ai_disclaimer: At GoDaddy, we use assistive AI tools to help identify how an applicant’s skills and experience align with the job-related criteria for the role.  The tool does not make hiring decisions, automatically reject candidates, or evaluate personal characteristics unrelated to job qualifications, such as age, health, or other legally protected characteristics.  The tool supports, but does not replace, our recruiters’ and hiring managers’ independent review and evaluation of applications.   Details about the personal data we process as part of your application and your privacy rights are available in our Applicant Privacy Policy: https://www.godaddy.com/en/legal/agreements/applicant-privacy-notice
